phrases.cultural_note: The Collection Lambert charges a standard entry fee with discounts for students and children.

responses.english: Ten euros full price, seven euros reduced.
responses.phonetic: dee zuhr-OH plan tah-REEF, set uhr-OH ahn tah-REEF ray-DWEE
responses.local: Dix euros plein tarif, sept euros en tarif réduit.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the temporary exhibitions are
phrases.cultural_note: The Collection Lambert regularly rotates temporary exhibitions alongside its permanent contemporary art collection.

responses.english: On the ground floor, left after the entrance.
responses.phonetic: oh ray-duh-shoh-SAY, ah gohsh ah-PREH lahn-TRAY
responses.local: Au rez-de-chaussée, à gauche après l'entrée.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is wheelchair access
phrases.text_local: Le musée est-il accessible en fauteuil roulant ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh myoo-ZAY eh-TEEL ak-seh-SEEBL ahn foh-TUY roo-LAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The museum is in a converted 17th-century mansion and has been adapted for wheelchair access.

responses.english: Yes, there is an elevator and access ramps.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ah uhn ah-sahn-SUHR ay day rahmp dak-SEH
responses.local: Oui, il y a un ascenseur et des rampes d'accès.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a guided tour today
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une visite guidée aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL oon vee-ZEET ghee-DAY oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: The Collection Lambert is one of France's leading contemporary art museums, housed in two 18th-century mansions in Avignon's historic centre.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the current exhibition is
phrases.text_local: Quelle est l'exposition en ce moment ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel ay leks-poh-ZEE-syon ahn suh moh-MAHN
